message:
feat(search_explain): Cx-first build_explain_context_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add `build_explain_context_with_cx(cx, storage, query, pane_filter)`
Cx-first sibling of `build_explain_context`. Pre-flight
`cx.checkpoint()?` gates the 5-query context-build (get_panes,
get_pane_indexing_stats, get_gaps, get_retention_cleanup_count,
get_segment_time_range) used by `ft search --explain` on the CLI.

Read-only and quick on typical DBs, so a single pre-flight seam is
sufficient. Delegates to `build_explain_context` for the actual work
so the legacy path remains authoritative.

Regression test `build_explain_context_with_cx_matches_legacy` pins
field parity on an empty DB: query, pane_filter, panes.len,
indexing_stats.len, gaps.len, retention_cleanup_count,
earliest_segment_at, latest_segment_at must all match between legacy
and cx-first paths.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target): 52/52 search_explain tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
